name: Salmon Tortilla Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whip together the cream cheese, mayonnaise, and mustard.
2. Divide the mixture evenly among the tortillas.
3. Spread the mixture on each tortilla.
4. Sprinkle with capers and cover with individual lettuce leaves.
5. Place salmon over all of the contents.
6. Roll the tortillas tightly and wrap in plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for at least 5 to 6 hours.
8. At serving time, cut into half-inch slices, sprinkle with dill, and serve. Skewer with a toothpick if necessary.
